content:
type: ANSWER
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
summary: Already added the debug log call inside the reset block in receive() (right after stream_start=False, before the else branch): 'if self.debug and self._logger.isEnabledFor(logging.DEBUG): self._logger.debug(f"State reset for field '{self.signature_field_name}' (allow_reuse=True)")' -- when you refactor into _reset_state(), please move this log line into that helper so it still fires on both receive() and tick() reset paths
